title: Data Engineer (Fast-growing MNC)
description:
• Growing and stable company
  • Able to work independently
  • Regional portfolio: SG/MY/THAI/VIET/INDO/PH

about the company
The role will sit directly within the supply chain team to ensure data architecture is deeply connected to business operations. You will be the technical backbone for the Supply Chain and Finance teams, transforming raw data from various sources into the fuel for our business intelligence.

about the job

  • Design and maintain scalable data pipelines that transition our current data landscape (moving from S3/EVA platforms) into a future-ready Microsoft Fabric environment.
  • Act as the technical translator for the Supply Chain department, ensuring that data models are optimized for tools.
  • Build and refine data warehouses and lakes that integrate diverse datasets, ensuring high integrity and security across all global market streams.
  • As a senior member of the team, you will provide technical coaching to junior analysts across various departments, fostering a data-driven culture

skills and experience required
4- 6 years of hands-on data engineering experience, ideally within a high-volume, global market setting. Experience with SAP (S4HANA) and real-time data streaming is highly preferred to help us navigate our current digital transformation.

what's an offer
This is a permanent role for a Data Engineer (Fast-growing MNC) will pay a salary range of $ 6,300 to $ 7,000 plus perks from the company.

To apply online please use the 'apply' function, alternatively you can reach me at https://www.linkedin.com/in/Oliviatoh-032330132/. (EA: 94C3609 / R22109942)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
